ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( ISCHANGED( Max_ARR__c ), ARR__c - Max_ARR__c >1, $User.Id <> OwnerId, Not ( ISCHANGED( Quote_Status__c )), $User.Id <> Owner.ManagerId, $User.Id <> Owner.Manager.ManagerId, $Profile.Id <> '00eb0000000oBvc' /*System Administrator*/, $Profile.Id <> '00e0O000001BCym' /*SW SalesOps Extended*/, $Profile.Id <> '00eb0000000dZws' /*SW SalesOps*/, $Profile.Name !="SW Billing" , $Profile.Name !="SW Billing Extended", $Profile.Id <> '00e0O0000016Suc' /*Integration User No DF*/, $Profile.Id <> '00e0O0000016TUV' /*Integration user*/, RecordType.DeveloperName <>"Rank_Ranger"
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Only the opportunity owner and their manager can edit Max ARR
